zh.lifeSummary: 當William Butler x-xh於1428年8月17日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓時，他的父親Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall30歲，母親Lady Alice Plumpton28歲。他於1447年與Margaret Piers在英國格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年6月在他的家鄉享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Butler x-xh于1428年8月17日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓时，他的父亲Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall30岁，母亲Lady Alice Plumpton28岁。他于1447年与Margaret Piers在英国格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1467年6月在他的家乡享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Butler x-xh was born on 17 August 1428, in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall, was 30 and his mother, Lady Alice Plumpton, was 28. He married Margaret Piers in 1447, in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in June 1467, in his hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Butler x-xh est né le 17 août 1428, à Badminton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Plumpton, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Piers en 1447, à Badminton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Butler x-xh am 17. August 1428 in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall 30 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Plumpton 28. Er hat 1447 in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England Margaret Piers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1467 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: William Butler x-xhが1428年8月17日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバドミントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hallは30歳，母Lady Alice Plumptonは28歳であった。1447年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバドミントンでMargaret Piersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年6月に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Butler x-xh(이)가 1428년 8월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 바드민턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Sudeley Boteler Lord of Rawcliffe Hall(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Plumpton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1447년 영국 그루스스터실르 바드민턴에서 Margaret Piers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 6월 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Piers в 1447 г. в местности бадминтон, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер июнь 1467 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.
